---
title: "Sven Panis"
image: "SvenPanis.jpg"
resources: CV_Panis_Sven_2025.pdf
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 5em
  links:
#    - text: Email
#      icon: envelope
#      href: sven.panis@hest.ethz.ch
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/sven-panis
    - text: CV
      icon: file-text
      href: CV_Panis_Sven_2025.pdf
    - text: Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7mZgaXMAAAAJ&hl=nl
    - text: ORCID
      #icon: info-square
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6321-583X
  id: ppc
---

:::{#ppc}

Welcome! I am an experimental psychologist interested in the temporal dynamics of psychological processes.
Check out my ongoing projects, my publications, and examples of hazard functions of response occurrence estimated from empirical RT data.

:::
